title: update c/common, c/image, c/storage
body:
Pin them to the specific versions that Podman v3.3 targets for RHEL.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Thanks @vrothberg.  For future reference, I did the steps listed on the Buildah install.md for [Vendoring](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/install.md#vendoring).  Is that different for Skopeo or was this a one off?  If different, I'd be happy to add it to Skopeo's install.md or similar.
The container is outdated in Skopeo's `make vendor-in-container`

> The container is outdated in Skopeo's `make vendor-in-container`

OK, I’ll prepare a PR to fix that — unless there’s a general consensus to remove it if we aren’t using it enough to have noticed?
